admin_danger_action_full_reset_descripti: [FR] Runs every action above and additionally deletes all non-protected users. Preserves only: you, the bootstrap admin, the sentinel user, and game type seed data. Equivalent to a freshly booted container.
admin_danger_action_wipe_game_history_de: [FR] Deletes every room, round, submission, and vote. Preserves packs, users, invites, and object storage.
admin_danger_action_wipe_invites_descrip: [FR] Deletes every invite token. Existing users stay logged in and keep their account — this only affects future sign-ups.
admin_danger_action_wipe_packs_descripti: [FR] Deletes every pack, every item, every pack media object, AND all game history that depends on them (rooms, rounds, submissions, votes). Empties the entire object storage bucket.
admin_danger_action_wipe_sessions_descri: [FR] Deletes every session and every magic link token except your own. All other users are bounced to login on their next request. Your session is preserved.
admin_danger_intro: [FR] These actions permanently delete data and cannot be undone. They are disabled in production. Use them in dev and preprod to reset the system to a known state.
admin_game_types_readonly_hint: [FR] Read-only — game types are registered in code.
admin_health_runbook_postgres: [FR] Likely causes: connection pool exhausted, slow query holding locks, or the DB container restarting. Check `docker compose logs postgres` and `pg_stat_activity`.
admin_health_runbook_rustfs: [FR] Likely causes: RustFS container crashed, network between backend ↔ pangolin broken, or credentials rotated. Verify RUSTFS_ENDPOINT reachable and the bucket exists.
admin_health_runbook_smtp: [FR] Likely causes: SMTP provider rate-limiting, credentials rotated, or relay DNS/TLS misconfig. Dev stacks should hit Mailpit; check SMTP_HOST and outbox toast state.
admin_invites_toast_created_malformed: [FR] Invite created, but response was malformed.
admin_network_degraded: [FR] Network degraded — backing off to every {seconds}s.
admin_pack_detail_empty: [FR] No items yet. Upload images to get started.
admin_pack_detail_system_tooltip: [FR] Bundled system pack — managed on the server filesystem
admin_packs_delete_confirm: [FR] Delete this pack? In-use packs will no longer be available for new rooms.
admin_users_deactivate_locked_tooltip: [FR] Protected bootstrap admin — cannot be deactivated
admin_users_last_login_none: [FR] No live session — user is logged out
admin_users_protected_tooltip: [FR] Protected bootstrap admin — cannot be deleted or have its role changed
admin_users_role_locked_tooltip: [FR] Protected bootstrap admin — role is locked

home_circles_subtitle: [FR] Track the people you play with most. See who you keep beating (or losing to), revisit old rooms, tag your favourite opponents.

marketing_adv1_body: [FR] One Docker Compose stack. Old laptop, home server, €5 VPS — it runs anywhere you run containers.
marketing_adv2_body: [FR] No public signup. Single-use invite tokens, optional email restriction. You decide who sits at your table.
marketing_adv3_body: [FR] No passwords to leak or rotate. Tokens are SHA-256 hashed in the DB, single-use, expire in 15 minutes.
marketing_adv4_body: [FR] Consent capture, one-click data export, admin-driven erasure with sentinel-UUID anonymisation. Retention windows built in.
marketing_adv5_body: [FR] Meme captioning is the first handler; trivia, drawing duels, pairs, quickfire slot in as plugins. No schema churn.
marketing_adv6_body: [FR] GPLv3. Go backend, SvelteKit frontend. Fork it, rebrand it, rewire it — just don't lock it back up.
marketing_final_body: [FR] Pick your lane. No wrong answer — and yes, the Lab Master always eats last.
marketing_final_footer: [FR] Hosting needs an account. Joining with a code does not.
marketing_final_lane2_body_guest: [FR] One account, unlimited rooms. Packs, players, rounds — all yours.
marketing_footer_tagline: [FR] A private, self-hosted party meme game. Built for circles that prefer to keep things inside.
marketing_hero_card1_caption: [FR] "my wifi after three people join the voice call"
marketing_hero_card2_caption: [FR] "me pretending I read the group chat before replying"
marketing_hero_card3_caption: [FR] "dev-ops trying to debug at 2am with one working brain cell"
marketing_hero_card4_caption: [FR] "my ISP when I ask for upload speed"
marketing_hero_mark: [FR] A party game you host yourself.
marketing_hero_sub: [FR] FabDoYouMeme is a self-hosted, invite-only party meme game. Spin up a room, share a 4-letter code, caption the deck, vote on the funniest. No accounts for players. No data leaves your lab.
marketing_hero_title_line2: [FR] Then deal your friends a punchline.
marketing_how_body: [FR] Three steps, one code, zero friction. Your friends don't sign up — they just show up.
marketing_meta_description: [FR] A party meme game for you and your people. Self-hosted, invite-only, GDPR-first. Host a room, share the code, caption, vote, laugh.
marketing_og_description: [FR] A party meme game for you and your people. Self-hosted, invite-only, GDPR-first.
marketing_og_title: [FR] FabDoYouMeme: a private, self-hosted party meme game
marketing_pack1_body: [FR] The default pack for new labs. Lightly spicy, universally legible, safe for in-laws.
marketing_pack2_body: [FR] For the group chat that Slacks in Markdown. Sprint retros welcome. CI failures encouraged.
marketing_pack3_body: [FR] Your pack. Upload images, write prompts, version it, ship it. The studio is a full-fledged tool.
marketing_packs_body: [FR] Start with a system pack or forge your own in the Lab. Every maker can upload images, write prompts, and publish decks to their instance.
marketing_popover_subtitle: [FR] No account needed — just the code.
marketing_round_body: [FR] Every session plays like a real card table. A timer. A hand. Four captions. One winner. Then shuffle and deal again.
marketing_step1_body: [FR] Pick a game, pick a pack, get a 4-letter room code. Everything runs on your box — no cloud in the loop.
marketing_step2_body: [FR] They tap the code on their phone. No download, no account, no tracking. Guests get a seat at the table.
marketing_step3_body: [FR] Round by round. The best punchline wins the hand. Scoring, timers, and reconnects are on the house.
marketing_table_card1_caption: [FR] "when the docker compose finally comes up"
marketing_table_card4_caption: [FR] "the raspberry pi that hosts our whole weekend"
marketing_why_body: [FR] Most party platforms turn your laughter into somebody's training data. This one doesn't — it's GPLv3, self-hosted, and boring where it counts.
privacy_alert_not_compliant: [FR] This page is not GDPR-compliant until they are configured.
privacy_alert_prefix: [FR] The following environment variables are not set:
privacy_intro: [FR] Plain language, no padding. Only the data actually collected, only the processors actually used. Operator details are injected from environment variables, so each deployment shows its own.
privacy_meta_description: [FR] Privacy policy for this FabDoYouMeme instance. GDPR Art. 13 disclosure.
privacy_s10_body: [FR] Database backups are retained for 7 days for disaster recovery. If you request erasure, your data is deleted from the live database immediately, but may persist in backups for up to 7 days. This is permitted under GDPR Art. 17(3)(b) (legitimate interest, incident recovery).
privacy_s1_email_suffix: [FR] . Use this address for all privacy requests (access, erasure, rectification, objection, complaints).
privacy_s3_consent_body: [FR] recorded when you accept this policy at registration.
privacy_s3_email_body: [FR] used to send authentication links; not shared with other players.
privacy_s3_scores_body: [FR] points earned per game; visible on leaderboards.
privacy_s3_session_body_suffix: [FR]  functional cookie for authentication; no tracking.
privacy_s3_submissions_body: [FR] captions or answers you submit; visible to room players.
privacy_s3_username_body: [FR] displayed in-game and on leaderboards; visible to all players in a room.
privacy_s5_access_body: [FR] download your data at Profile → "Download My Data".
privacy_s5_portability_body: [FR] same as above; downloads as JSON.
privacy_s5_rectification_body: [FR] update username or email at Profile.
privacy_s5_withdraw_prefix: [FR] withdrawal counts as an erasure request; email
privacy_s6_intro: [FR] If you believe your data is being processed unlawfully, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your national data protection authority:
privacy_s7_body_prefix: [FR] This platform is intended for users aged
privacy_s7_body_suffix: [FR] . By registering, you confirm that you meet this requirement. If you are under 16, parental consent must be obtained; contact
privacy_s8_intro: [FR] This platform sets exactly one cookie:
privacy_s8_outro: [FR] No tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies are used. No third-party cookies are set.
privacy_s8_session_purpose: [FR] Authentication, required to stay logged in
privacy_s9_intro: [FR] Your email address is transmitted to the SMTP provider configured by the operator to send authentication links:
privacy_s9_outro: [FR] All other data (username, submissions, votes, scores, session, logs, backups) is stored on the operator's own infrastructure and is not shared with any third party.
profile_delete_account_body_prefix: [FR] To request deletion of your account and all associated data, contact your admin. See the
profile_download_body: [FR] Download a copy of all your personal data stored in this service.
profile_email_change_pending_hint: [FR] Your current email stays active until you click the verification link.
profile_email_toast_sent: [FR] Check your new email address for a verification link.
profile_export_prepare_error: [FR] Could not prepare download file. Try again.
profile_greeting_tone_hint: [FR] How spicy should your dashboard hello be? Drag to taste.
profile_theme_hint: [FR] Auto matches the time of day. Override stays until you change it.
replay_empty_body: [FR] This game ended before anyone played a round.
room_code_share_hint: [FR] Share the 4-letter code — or tap the link to let friends join in one tap.
room_end_confirm_body: [FR] All players will be disconnected. This can't be undone.
room_end_error_default: [FR] Could not end the room. Try again.
room_end_reason_all_disconnected_subtext: [FR] The room ended because all players disconnected.
room_end_reason_host_disconnected_subtex: [FR] The host disconnected; the room closed.
room_end_reason_pack_exhausted_subtext: [FR] Add more items to this pack to play longer.
room_kick_body: [FR] They'll be disconnected immediately and won't be able to rejoin this room.
room_rail_how_it_works_submitting: [FR] Write the funniest caption for the prompt. Everyone submits blind — captions stay anonymous until the vote closes.
room_rail_how_it_works_voting: [FR] Pick the caption that made you laugh hardest. You can't vote for your own, and votes reveal at the end of the round.
room_settings_allow_skip_body: [FR] Players can skip voting if no caption landed. If everyone skips, the round ends with no points.
room_settings_host_paced_body: [FR] You advance each round manually instead of auto-advancing.
studio_help_moderation_body: [FR] Admins can flag or ban public packs. Flagged packs stop appearing in public picks until reviewed.
studio_help_pack_game_body: [FR] When you host a room, you pick one of your packs. The pack must match the game type's item kind (image packs go with image games, text with text).
studio_help_versions_body: [FR] Each item keeps its version history. Upload a new version anytime; revert to a previous one if a change didn't land well.
studio_help_visibility_middle: [FR]  — only you can pick them. Publish to
studio_help_visibility_suffix: [FR]  and any Maker can use your pack in their rooms. Publishing notifies admins for moderation.
studio_help_what_body: [FR] A pack is a named collection of items — images or text prompts that a game draws from.

studio_welcome_body: [FR] Packs are your personal collections of game content — images or prompts your games draw from.
